scope.summary: Send a text message to a thread from the UI: a send_message command reuses an authenticated session from managed state and delegates to the zalo layer, verified by a live send.
goals: command/ send_message validates thread_id/text and reuses the stored session for account_id
Sessions are kept in managed state on login so credentials are never re-sent from the UI
Live smoke delivers one real text message and Zalo returns a message id
nonGoals: Optimistic UI rendering / message echo reconciliation

acceptance.description: command/ send_message validates input, reuses the stored session, and returns a message id from the zalo layer.
Frontend composer sends via send_message; build succeeds.
A real text message is delivered to the authorized recipient and Zalo returns a non-empty message id.
